creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
dougb       2010-08-13 01:34:26 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    .                    MOVED 
    lang                 Makefile 
  Removed files:
    lang/ifc7            Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
    lang/ifc7/files      assert_fail.c cpio-exclude 
                         cpio-exclude_noportdocs cxa_atexit.c 
                         errno_location.c ld.c linux_file.c 
                         linux_stat.c mcount.S mmap.c 
                         patch-ia32::bin::ifc pthread.c stderr.c 
                         stdin.c stdout.c sysconf.c 
  Log:
  In my sweep of ports that have no SHA256 I contacted maho about lang/ifc7.
  He confirmed my suspicion that the distfiles are no longer available, but
  given his fond recollection of work on this port he asked me to swing
  the axe, so here you go.
  
  Sad to say good-bye
  Many happy memories
  Sources are no more
  
  PR:             ports/149454
  Submitted by:   me
